page_title: Police certificate: When to get a police certificate - Canada.ca
h1: When to get a police certificate

h2: If you need a request letter
How long your police certificate is valid
Submit scanned copies of the original certificates
h3: For the country where you currently reside

sections.heading: If you need a request letter
items: Some countries will give you a police certificate only if you have a request letter from us. If this applies to you
upload a document in the police certificate field in the document checklist that says “I am applying from a country that requires an official request letter from IRCC to get a police certificate.”
We’ll then review your application. If it is otherwise complete , we’ll send you more information on how to get a police certificate.

sections.heading: How long your police certificate is valid
For the country where you currently reside
items: The police certificate for the country where you currently reside must be issued no more than 6 months before the date you submit your application. As processing times may vary, we may ask you for updated certificates.

sections.heading: For any other country
items: For any other country, the police certificate must be issued after the last time you resided there for 6 consecutive months or longer since the age of 18.
Some countries put expiry dates on their police certificates. If this is your situation, include the certificate. We’ll accept it if:
IRCC may require updated documentation at any time during processing.
You don’t need to give us police certificates for any period of time before you were 18 years old or for time spent in Canada.
bullets: it was issued after the last time you stayed there for 6 consecutive months or longer
it is not for the country where you currently reside

sections.heading: Submit scanned copies of the original certificates
items: Police certificates must be scanned copies of the original certificate(s) in colour. Certified true copies or unauthorized copies won’t be accepted and will result in your application being rejected.
